name: one-person-billionaire
description: Honest 22-lesson curriculum + 66 Claude skills + 7 chained commands for solo agent operators chasing outlier outcomes ($5M-$50M ARR over 5-7 years). Hormozi's $100M Offers + the GTM/distribution/monetization layers most engineering courses skip.

plugins.name: one-person-billionaire
plugins.description: All 66 skills + 7 chained commands + 4 templates + 1 workflow spec, in one drop-in plugin. Use individual skills with /skill-name or chain them with the slash commands.
